/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now -Wl,-z,noexecstack -shared -Wl,-soname,libcust_opapi.so -o libcust_opapi.so op_host/CMakeFiles/cust_optiling.dir/qmm_custom.cpp.o op_host/CMakeFiles/cust_opapi.dir/__/autogen/aclnn_qmm_custom.cpp.o op_host/CMakeFiles/cust_opapi.dir/__/autogen/custom_op_registry_V2.cpp.o   -L/home/developer/Ascend/cann-9.0.0/lib64  -L/mnt/workspace/QmmCustom_problem_252_template/code/build/op_kernel/ascendc_kernels/binary/library  -L/mnt/workspace/QmmCustom_problem_252_template/code/build/library/ascendc_kernels  -Wl,-rpath,/home/developer/Ascend/cann-9.0.0/lib64:/mnt/workspace/QmmCustom_problem_252_template/code/build/op_kernel/ascendc_kernels/binary/library:/mnt/workspace/QmmCustom_problem_252_template/code/build/library/ascendc_kernels: -lnnopbase -lascendcl -lexe_graph -lregister -ltiling_api -lexe_graph -lregister -ltiling_api -Wl,--whole-archive -lrt2_registry -Wl,--no-whole-archive -lnnopbase -lascendcl -lkernels -lopregistry
